productDisplayName: Asics Women's Running Graphic Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with UPF 15 protection and Cyber Dry technology, short sleeves, retro-reflective property and casual tone gradation print above the hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm water upto 30 degreesUse mild detergent Do not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside-out in shadeCool ironA perfect sportswear, this polyester t-shirt from asics is what you need to enhance those sporting performances. Engineered with UPF 15 technology, this shirt blocks away 1/15th of the UV rays hitting you, thus protecting your body from harmful radiation. Besides, the Cyber Dry technology coupled with the cyber reversible property spreads sweat away from the body, trapping the warm air inside and wicking away sweat. The retro-reflective on this short allows visibility in low light conditions, helping you stay safe. Team this with performance shorts, shoes and socks when on the run, or simply pair it wioth tracks or jeans for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7 ft, Chest-31", Waist-28"
